items.candidate_patch:
class Solution:
    def increasingBST(self, root: TreeNode) -> TreeNode:
        newRoot = TreeNode(0)
        self.temp = newRoot
        def inorder(root):
            if root is None: return None
            inorder(root.left)
            new = TreeNode(root.val)
            self.temp.right = new
            self.temp = self.temp.right
            inorder(root.right)
        inorder(root)
        return newRoot.right

attempt_logs.candidate_patch:
class Solution:
    def increasingBST(self, root: TreeNode) -> TreeNode:
        newRoot = TreeNode(0)
        self.temp = newRoot
        def inorder(root):
            if root is None: return None
            inorder(root.left)
            new = TreeNode(root.val)
            self.temp.right = new
            self.temp = self.temp.right
            inorder(root.right)
        inorder(root)
        return newRoot.right
